message:
🐛 Add direct Statuspage.io fallback for provider health checks (#319)

When the backend /providers/health proxy is unavailable (older agent
versions), fall back to direct Statuspage.io API checks from the
browser. Uses status.claude.com (not status.anthropic.com which has
a CORS-breaking redirect) and status.openai.com.

Two-tier approach: backend proxy first (all providers), then direct
Statuspage.io for uncovered providers with CORS-safe endpoints.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
